title: Plush Japanese Sausage Noodles
description: A hearty and comforting Japanese dish featuring German sausages, score-fat, and noodles, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This flexitarian-friendly recipe combines umami flavors with pillowy soft noodles.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Slice the German sausage into thick rounds.
Heat the score-fat in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced sausage to the pan and cook until browned.
Add the dashi broth, soy sauce, sake, and mirin to the pan and bring to a simmer.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and toss to combine with the sauce and sausage.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the noodles are well coated.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with thinly sliced green onions.
